notes: Two-leg XBR/XNG energy return-spread reversion basket from the approved EIA-OILGAS-RSPREAD-2026_XBR_XNG_RSPR card. The EA runs from the XBRUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute log-return spread over a fixed lookback. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not the standalone legs.
